dataset: Odoo HR Community Edition - Official Demo Dataset

pi_items.source: Odoo official demo data (hr/data/hr_demo.xml), confirmed in setup_data.py line 9 which lists 20 employees including 'Anita Oliver'
Task specification - arbitrary badge ID assigned to Anita Oliver for this task, verified in verifier.py line 75 and task.json description

pi_items.verified_value: /home/ga/Documents/anita_profile.png (path is correct, but source URL is broken)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 11 specifies: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/microsoft/fluentui-emoji/main/assets/Technologist/Flat/technologist_flat.png - This URL returns 404 HTTP error

URL tested with curl returns HTTP 404. GitHub API confirms no 'Technologist' folder exists in microsoft/fluentui-emoji assets. Only 'Man technologist' exists, with structure: assets/Man technologist/Default/Flat/[files]. Additionally, web search results indicate technologist emoji is not available due to trademark concerns.

Verified in export_result.sh line 39 which queries these exact fields: image_1920 and barcode. Also confirmed in verifier.py lines 46-47 which check image_present (from image_1920) and barcode_value. These are standard Odoo hr.employee model fields.

pi_items.verified_value: Anita Oliver is one of 20 employees in Odoo's official demo dataset, included in hr/data/hr_demo.xml
pi_items.source: setup_data.py lines 5-10 document the official demo employees list from Odoo HR module

privileged_info_summary: The task targets 'Anita Oliver', a real employee from Odoo's official HR demo dataset (one of 20 bundled demo employees). The target badge ID 'AO-9942' is a synthetic value created for this task. The task requires uploading a profile image from /home/ga/Documents/anita_profile.png and setting a badge ID in the hr.employee model fields 'image_1920' and 'barcode'. However, the setup script contains a critical bug: the image source URL (Microsoft FluentUI emoji 'Technologist') returns 404 and the emoji does not exist in the repository (trademark concerns). The required_fields (image_1920 and barcode) are verified as the correct Odoo hr.employee model fields.
